BroadcastState.title: BroadcastState
BroadcastState.description: Represents the full layout, scoreboard, timer, stats, and overlays state of a live stream broadcast.

syncKey.description: Unique key identifying the broadcast sync channel.

ownerUid.description: UID of the operator who owns and controls this broadcast state.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this broadcast state was last modified.

stateJson.description: Serialized JSON string of the BroadcastState object containing all game data and configuration.

/broadcast_states/{syncKey}.description: Stores current real-time stream state under a unique shareable sync key, accessible by OBS and controllers.
